name: The Nuts and Bolts of Natural Language to SQL Translation: A Systematic Analysis of Model Pipeline Optimisation Approaches and their Interactions
summary: arXiv:2607.10911v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In the age of large language models, Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) translation remains an open problem with many useful applications. We explore...
description: arXiv:2607.10911v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In the age of large language models, Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) translation remains an open problem with many useful applications. We explore interactions between several NL2SQL pipeline extensions to inspire development of more lightweight models. Specifically, we integrate the NatSQL intermediate representation, include a preprocessing s...
author: Filip Klubicka, Vasudevan Nedumpozhimana, Sneha Rautmare, Bora Caglayan, Mingxue Wang, John D. Kelleher
